accessibility.rotateLandscape: Rotate to landscape for the full table layout.

scenarioBooklet.title: Stories, rules, and table texture
scenarioBooklet.subtitle: Read each dossier like a spread from the campaign guide, then carry the selected chapter straight into setup.

now.worldBlockers: Adoption remains sealed until the deck has been drawn.
now.coalitionAction: Lay out planned moves on the player mats, then place every commit marker.
now.coalitionReady: The table is ready to resolve the planned moves.
now.coalitionBlockers: Commit remains sealed until every seat has placed its marker.
now.compromiseAction: A compromise slip is on the table. Record each vote to proceed.
now.compromiseChoices: Open the offer and resolve the ballot.
now.compromiseBlockers: The round cannot advance while the compromise is unsettled.
now.endAction: Close the minute book, advance delayed effects, and begin the next round.
now.endChoices: The table is ready for the end-of-round resolution.
now.gameOverAction: Review the record, the charter outcome, and the surviving institutions.
now.gameOverChoices: Export the table state if you want to keep this sitting.

phases.SYSTEM_COPY: The system presses first. Resolve escalation before the table can answer.
phases.COALITION_COPY: Lay out two prepared moves for each seat, then mark the whole coalition ready.
phases.RESOLUTION_COPY: Prepared moves resolve in order. Check the board, then reckon with victory or loss.

home.roomOfflineOnly: This build was cut for offline play only.
home.roomChecking: Checking whether the room service can hold the table...
home.roomUnavailable: Room service did not answer. Local play remains available.
home.rulesBody: Each seat carries a different movement, its own limits, and its own role in the coalition. Room play preserves Secret Mandates for private coordination; local tables keep every objective in the open.
home.pasteSave: Paste a serialized save payload here.
home.threatValue: If any region reaches 6 Extraction Tokens, the coalition loses.

app.roomCredentialMissingBody: No seat credential was found for this room on this browser. Start from the home screen or recreate the room.
app.roomRestoreFailed: The room could not be restored. The app returned to the home screen.
app.roomSyncLostBody: The room service stopped responding. The table was kept alive offline.
app.roomFallbackLocal: Could not reach the room service. The game started offline instead.
app.commandFailedBody: The room rejected the command. The table stayed unchanged.
app.saveRestoredBody: Serialized state loaded into a local table.
app.saveInvalidBody: Save payload could not be parsed.
app.autosaveMissingBody: No autosave was found for this browser.
app.saveCopiedBody: Serialized save copied to the clipboard.
app.clipboardUnavailableBody: Copy the serialized save from the app state if needed.
app.rebuildingStateBody: The app is resolving the room permalink and seat credential.

room.lobbyDetail: Claim one player slot, gather the full coalition, then let the host launch the room into active play.
room.shareRoom: Share this room link with the coalition so each player can claim their own slot.
room.secretMandatesOnline: Secret Mandates stay private in room play. The full board remains public, but each browser only controls its own factions.
room.seatLocked: This player slot is already claimed.
room.waitingForClaim: Waiting for a player to claim this slot.
room.hostReadyToLaunch: Every player slot is claimed. Launch the room when the coalition is ready.
room.hostWaitingToLaunch: The host can launch the room once every player slot is claimed.
room.waitingForHost: All slots are claimed. Waiting for the host to launch the room.
room.waitingForCoalition: Waiting for the remaining players to claim their slots.
room.roomLinkCopiedBody: The room link was copied to the clipboard.
room.roomLinkCopyFallback: Copy the room URL from the browser address bar and share it with the coalition.
room.claimFailedBody: That player slot could not be claimed. Refresh the lobby and try again.
room.startFailedBody: The lobby could not launch the match yet. Make sure every player slot is claimed.

guide.playerGuideDetail: Use this as the fast onboarding sheet for the current ruleset.
guide.coreThreat1: Extraction Tokens mark where the System is tightening its hold. System cards and interventions keep driving them onto the map.
guide.coreThreat2: If any region reaches 6 Extraction Tokens, the struggle breaks there and the coalition loses.
guide.coreThreat3: Global Gaze and War Machine decide how much pressure the next round can carry.
guide.loop1: System Phase: resolve crisis pressure, backlash, and interventions before the coalition can answer.
guide.loop2: Coalition Phase: prepare two moves for each seat, then mark every seat ready.
guide.loop3: Resolution Phase: resolve prepared moves in priority order, then check victory, defeat, and mandate fallout.
guide.economy1: Comrades hold ground in regions and are committed from the places they defend.
guide.economy2: Evidence belongs to seats and fuels campaigns, appeals, and the circulation of testimony.
guide.economy3: Defense is temporary. It exists only to blunt the next system strike before it clears.
guide.beacon1: Symbolic mode reveals three active Beacons from a six-card deck.
guide.beacon2: Online rooms keep Secret Mandates private. Reaching the public win condition while any mandate fails still ends in defeat there.
guide.beacon3: Local tables remove Secret Mandates entirely so every movement can coordinate in the open.

mode.liberationSummary: Reach the end of Resolution with every region at 1 Extraction Token or fewer.
mode.symbolicSummary: Complete all three active Beacons before the symbolic window seals.
mode.liberationProgress: {{count}} regions already sit at the threshold.
mode.liberationStatus: Keep every region below the breach line while preserving every Secret Mandate.

game.modeDescLiberation: In Liberation mode, the coalition must force extraction down in every region without breaking its own movements in the process.
game.modeDescSymbolic: In Symbolic mode, the coalition must align the active Beacons before the symbolic window closes, while still holding back extraction.
game.extractionPoolTooltip: Shared system pressure still in the extraction pool.
game.regionExtractionTooltip: Extraction Tokens: {{count}}. If this reaches 6, the region is lost. Remove them with Launch Campaign, Build Solidarity, and resistance effects.
game.regionDefenseTooltip: Defense: {{count}}. Defense absorbs the next system strike here, then clears. Raise it with Defend and supportive effects before the system phase.
game.regionBodiesTooltip: Comrades: {{count}}. Comrades are the people and organizing strength in this region. Commit them to Launch Campaign, Build Solidarity, and Defend.
game.nearBreachRisk: This region is already near the breach line.
game.campaignRisk: Campaigns can consume resources without clearing the front.
game.beaconPressureSummary: {{count}} beacon objectives still need to be completed.
game.regionsAboveThreshold: {{count}} regions remain above the liberation threshold.
game.phaseSummarySystem: Resolve the system strike and absorb the backlash.
game.phaseSummaryCoalition: Prepare two moves for each seat, then mark the coalition ready.
game.phaseSummaryResolution: Resolve the prepared moves, then reckon with victory or defeat.
game.phaseSummaryWin: The coalition forced open its path to victory.
game.phaseSummaryLoss: The coalition lost this round of the struggle.
game.comradesReinforce: Reinforce a region with fresh Comrades.
game.comradesGather: Gather Evidence and draw new resistance cards.
game.comradesCampaign: Press a vulnerable front with coordinated force.
game.comradesSmuggle: Move Evidence across seats through a corridor.
game.comradesShield: Set a shield against the next strike.
game.comradesUnleash: Unleash a prepared card effect now.
game.drawResolutionLead: Open the crisis deck, reveal the current draw, and place the active card on the board.
game.adoptResolutionLead: Cards are on the table. Review the crisis slot, then adopt the resolution.
game.temperatureDetail: Band {{band}}. {{count}} crisis card{{plural}} on the next world resolution.
game.trackGazeHigh: Global Gaze is breaking through the blockade.
game.trackGazeLow: Global Gaze is fragile and easily reversed.
game.trackWarHigh: War Machine is near a breach posture.
game.trackWarLow: War Machine pressure is contained for now.
game.systemPhaseHint: Press play to resolve the system strike and open coalition planning.
game.coalitionPhaseHint: Prepare moves, then mark every seat ready.
game.coalitionMovesRemainingHint: Prepare both moves for this seat before marking it ready.
game.coalitionWaitingHint: Every seat must be marked ready before the coalition can resolve.
game.coalitionResolveHint: The coalition is ready. Resolve the prepared moves.
game.resolutionPhaseHint: Check the aftermath, then begin the next round.
game.noMajorChangeYetBody: Resolve the current phase to see the next material shifts on tracks, regions, and coalition resources.
game.phaseInsightSystemCards: System cards and intervention push Extraction Tokens, War Machine pressure, and direct harm onto exposed regions.
game.phaseInsightSystemRefresh: Defense clears, each seat regains two moves, and resolving this strike opens coalition planning.
game.phaseInsightCoalitionPlan: Each seat prepares two moves. Costs and targets are locked now so the coalition can resolve in a shared order.
game.phaseInsightCoalitionReadyPending: This seat still has moves to prepare before it can mark ready.
game.phaseInsightCoalitionReady: When every seat is ready, the prepared moves resolve and the board changes.
game.phaseInsightResolutionResolve: Prepared moves now change Domains, regions, Comrades, Evidence, and cards in priority order.
game.phaseInsightResolutionCheck: After resolution, the game checks victory, defeat, Secret Mandates, and whether a new round begins.
game.phaseInsightResolutionCheckLocal: After resolution, the game checks victory, defeat, and whether a new round begins.
game.mandatePrivate: Visible only to this seat owner
game.mandatePanelBody: This objective remains private during room play. The coalition still shares the full board, history, Global Gaze, War Machine, and public card reveals.
game.startupMandateReveal: Private instruction before the table opens
game.privateInstruction: Read the private instruction before the struggle resumes.
game.privateInstructionReview: Review the letter, then return it to the envelope.
game.mandatePrivateLetter: Keep this letter private to your seat.
game.drawReviewHint: Review the latest reveal here, then inspect the discard pile for earlier cards.
game.systemReviewHint: Review the latest escalation here, then inspect the active tray for structural pressure already in play.
game.noRevealYet: No card has been revealed for this deck yet.
game.revealToDiscard: Revealed on the board, then moved to discard.
game.revealToActive: Revealed on the board, then placed in the escalation tray.
game.drawsVisible: Draws reveal on the board before they settle into discard.
game.drawsWaiting: Draws will reveal here when the decks move.

map.viewportDetail: SVG board restored as a live state layer
map.viewportNote: Markers reflect Extraction Tokens, Defense, and Comrades on the current six-region ruleset.
map.legendDetail: Read the board at a glance
map.worldMapAlt: World map showing the six canonical theatres

debug.title: Debug
debug.autoplayIdle: Ready to run scripted rounds through the normal game flow.
debug.autoplayInvalid: Enter a valid round count before starting autoplay.
debug.autoplayLocalOnly: Autoplay is only available on local tables.
debug.autoplayFinished: Autoplay finished at the requested round mark.
debug.autoplayWon: Autoplay stopped because the coalition won.
debug.autoplayLost: Autoplay stopped because the coalition lost.
debug.autoplayNoCommand: Autoplay found no legal command and stopped.
debug.autoplayCommandError: Autoplay stopped after a command error.

history.rollMeaningNone: No board change followed from the roll.
history.eventMandateFailure: Public victory failed because Secret Mandates were broken.
history.eventComradesExhausted: A movement seat was reduced to 0 Comrades.
history.eventPublicAttention: System pressure shifted under public attention.

campaignResult.equationGeneralExplanation: Launch Campaign adds the dice result to all campaign bonuses and penalties, then compares that final total to the threshold.
campaignResult.equationSpecificExplanation: Here the dice showed {{dieOne}} and {{dieTwo}}. The total modifier was {{modifier}}, coming from {{modifiers}}. That produced {{total}} against the threshold of {{target}}+.
campaignResult.titleBacklash: The campaign meets the System’s reprisal.
campaignResult.titleAttention: The campaign falters, but the struggle is seen.
campaignResult.titleSuccess: The campaign breaks open a line of advance.
campaignResult.titleSurge: The campaign surges and forces the System backward.
campaignResult.descriptionBacklash: The threshold was not reached. The movement pays a price, yet the struggle continues beyond this blow.
campaignResult.descriptionAttention: The threshold was missed. Public attention shifts, but extraction remains in place and the movement regathers.
campaignResult.descriptionSuccess: The threshold was reached. The movement secures real ground, though never without cost.
campaignResult.descriptionSurge: The threshold was exceeded with force. Extraction gives way and the campaign leaves the System reeling, for now.

terminal.feedbackExtraction: {{region}} carried the heaviest pressure at {{count}} Extraction Tokens.
terminal.feedbackMandatesHeld: All revealed Secret Mandates held at the close.
terminal.reasonLiberation: The coalition forced a liberation opening before the System could seal every front.
terminal.reasonSymbolic: The coalition aligned the active Beacons and held enough ground for a symbolic breakthrough.
terminal.reasonExtractionBreach: {{region}} reached 6 Extraction Tokens and the breach could not be contained.
terminal.reasonMandateFailure: A public victory was reached, but Secret Mandates were broken in the final reckoning.
terminal.reasonComradesExhausted: One movement seat was reduced to 0 Comrades before the struggle could hold the line.
terminal.reasonSuddenDeath: The scenario reached sudden death without a decisive victory.
terminal.closingVictory: The victory is real, but incomplete. The System is wounded, not gone.
terminal.closingDefeat: The scenario closes in loss, but the struggle continues beyond this table.

runtime.escalationExtraction: Extraction spread too far across the map. A structural escalation enters play.
runtime.escalationWarMachine: War Machine pressure crossed its escalation line. A structural escalation enters play.
runtime.escalationGlobalGaze: Global Gaze collapsed beneath the pressure line. A structural escalation enters play.
runtime.escalationFailedCampaigns: Repeated failed campaigns hardened the system. A structural escalation enters play.
runtime.escalationSymbolicRound: The symbolic window narrowed. A structural escalation enters play.
runtime.lossMandateFailure: Public victory was reached, but {{count}} Secret Mandate(s) failed.
runtime.drawResistanceSummary: Seat {{seat}} revealed {{count}} resistance card(s) and moved them to discard.
runtime.startupWithdrawalSummary: Seat {{seat}} withdrew a startup resistance card.
runtime.traceComradesExhausted: A movement seat was reduced to 0 Comrades.
runtime.traceNoDomain: No Domain was selected for this effect.
runtime.traceNoRegion: No region was selected for this effect.
runtime.traceDrawHandled: Card draw was resolved by its dedicated trace.
runtime.lossSuddenDeath: Round {{round}} ended without a decisive victory.

base_design.name: Where the Stones Cry Out
base_design.description: A six-region cooperative struggle against extraction, militarism, hunger, and erasure.
base_design.introduction: The coalition is trying to do more than survive. It must break extraction, move Evidence across borders, and keep every movement's Secret Mandate alive long enough to win together.

tahrir_square.name: 2011 — TAHRIR SQUARE
tahrir_square.introduction: Players lead the January 25 Revolution: a sprawling, leaderful movement that broke a thirty-year dictatorship in eighteen days. The struggle does not end with Mubarak's fall; it continues through military transition, electoral capture, and the 2013 coup.

woman_life_freedom.name: 2022 — WOMAN, LIFE, FREEDOM
woman_life_freedom.description: "For Jina. For freedom. For the women who burn their chains."
woman_life_freedom.introduction: After the morality police killed Jina (Mahsa) Amini, an intersectional revolutionary uprising spread across Iran. Women and schoolgirls moved at its front, burning headscarves in the street and shaking the foundations of the Islamic Republic.

algerian_war_of_independence.name: 1954 — ALGERIAN WAR OF INDEPENDENCE
algerian_war_of_independence.introduction: Algerian movements confront a colonial system of extraction, militarism, detention, and settler reaction. The struggle stretches from the Algiers corridor to Kabylia, the Saharan south, the Tunisian frontier, and the metropole itself.

WarMachine.name: War Machine
WarMachine.description: Militarism, bases, and logistics of permanent intervention.

DyingPlanet.name: Dying Planet
DyingPlanet.description: Ecological defense against flood, fire, extraction, and collapse.

GildedCage.name: Gilded Cage
GildedCage.description: Freedom from carceral control, dispossession, and managed rights.

SilencedTruth.name: Silenced Truth
SilencedTruth.description: Evidence, press freedom, and the ability to circulate testimony.

EmptyStomach.name: Empty Stomach
EmptyStomach.description: Food sovereignty, debt resistance, and survival beyond austerity.

FossilGrip.name: Fossil Grip
FossilGrip.description: Energy justice against pipeline rule, sacrifice zones, and fuel empires.

StolenVoice.name: Stolen Voice
StolenVoice.description: Cultural survival, language, art, and memory against erasure.

RevolutionaryWave.name: Revolutionary Wave
RevolutionaryWave.description: The momentum, hope, and presence of bodies in the street.

PatriarchalGrip.name: Patriarchal Grip
PatriarchalGrip.description: Regime control over bodies, hair, and public life.

WAR.name: War & Conflict
WAR.description: Militarism, siege, occupation, and organized coercion.

CLIMATE.name: Climate Crisis
CLIMATE.description: Flood, fire, extraction, and ecological breakdown.

RIGHTS.name: Human Rights
RIGHTS.description: Legal protections, civil rights, and the fight against state abuse.

SPEECH_INFO.name: Speech & Information
SPEECH_INFO.description: Press freedom, testimony, and the struggle over narrative control.

ENERGY.name: Energy Access
ENERGY.description: Fuel corridors, grids, and contested resource systems.

CULTURE.name: Art & Culture
CULTURE.description: Memory, ceremony, language, and living cultural continuity.

WarMachine.name: War Machine
WarMachine.description: Militarism, bases, and logistics of permanent intervention.

DyingPlanet.name: Dying Planet
DyingPlanet.description: Ecological defense against flood, fire, extraction, and collapse.

GildedCage.name: Gilded Cage
GildedCage.description: Freedom from carceral control, dispossession, and managed rights.

SilencedTruth.name: Silenced Truth
SilencedTruth.description: Evidence, press freedom, and the ability to circulate testimony.

EmptyStomach.name: Empty Stomach
EmptyStomach.description: Food sovereignty, debt resistance, and survival beyond austerity.

FossilGrip.name: Fossil Grip
FossilGrip.description: Energy justice against pipeline rule, sacrifice zones, and fuel empires.

StolenVoice.name: Stolen Voice
StolenVoice.description: Cultural survival, language, art, and memory against erasure.

RevolutionaryWave.name: Revolutionary Wave
RevolutionaryWave.description: The momentum, hope, and presence of bodies in the street.

PatriarchalGrip.name: Patriarchal Grip
PatriarchalGrip.description: Regime control over bodies, hair, and public life.

Congo.name: Congo Basin
Congo.description: Mining corridors, rainforest sovereignty, and cobalt imperialism.

Levant.name: The Levant
Levant.description: Occupation, siege, surveillance, and the politics of imposed scarcity.

Amazon.name: The Amazon
Amazon.description: Forest defense against land theft, agribusiness, and settler violence.
Amazon.strapline: The forest is treated as inventory.

Sahel.name: The Sahel
Sahel.description: Climate breakdown, hunger, border regimes, and securitized aid.
Sahel.strapline: Security doctrine feeds the famine line.

Mekong.name: The Mekong
Mekong.description: Water memory against dams, agribusiness, and fossil corridors.
Mekong.strapline: The river is partitioned for profit.

Andes.name: The Andes
Andes.description: Highland resistance to debt, lithium extraction, and privatized life.
Andes.strapline: The mountain is priced before it is heard.

Cairo.name: Cairo
Cairo.description: The center of power, Tahrir Square, the Ministry of Interior.

Alexandria.name: Alexandria
Alexandria.description: Industrial hubs, Khaled Said’s neighborhood, dockworker resistance.

NileDelta.name: Nile Delta
NileDelta.description: Textile strikes, agricultural density, brutal state security presence.

UpperEgypt.name: Upper Egypt
UpperEgypt.description: Traditional strongholds, sectarian flashpoints, economic neglect.

Suez.name: Suez
Suez.description: Militarized zones, early uprisings, intense crackdown.

Sinai.name: Sinai
Sinai.description: Bedouin marginalization, security vacuums, border violence.

Kurdistan.name: Kurdistan
Kurdistan.description: Jina Amini's home, fierce resistance, heavy militarization.

Isfahan.name: Isfahan
Isfahan.description: Historic city, water protests, schoolgirl resistance.

Khuzestan.name: Khuzestan
Khuzestan.description: Oil rich, ethnically marginalized, water crises.

Algiers.name: Algiers
Algiers.description: The capital corridor from Alger through Blida and Tipaza, where urban insurgency meets colonial administration.

KabylieMountains.name: Kabylie Mountains
KabylieMountains.description: Kabylia and its mountain approaches, a guerrilla stronghold for endurance, shelter, and political cohesion.

Oran.name: Oran
Oran.description: The western settler coast around Oran, where colonial power hardens into reaction and veto.
Oran.strapline: The settler coast refuses to yield.

SaharaSouth.name: Sahara South
SaharaSouth.description: The Saharan south, where long distances, desert routes, and reprisal test rural organizing.

TunisianBorder.name: Tunisian Border
TunisianBorder.description: The eastern frontier toward Tunisia, a corridor for supplies, testimony, and strategic passage.
TunisianBorder.strapline: The corridor that keeps the struggle breathing.

FrenchMetropoleInfluence.name: French Metropole Influence
FrenchMetropoleInfluence.description: Political and media struggle inside France over legitimacy, repression, and the terms of colonial exit.
FrenchMetropoleInfluence.strapline: The colonial center is part of the battlefield.

congo_basin_collective.name: Congo Basin Collective
congo_basin_collective.passive: Organize gains +1 Comrade in Congo and Launch Campaign gains +1 there.
congo_basin_collective.mandateDescription: End with Congo at 2 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Dying Planet ahead of War Machine.

levant_sumud.name: Levant Sumud Front
levant_sumud.passive: Defend gains +1 Defense in the Levant and campaigns against War Machine gain +1 there.
levant_sumud.weakness: Organize outside the Levant gains -1 Comrade.
levant_sumud.mandateDescription: End with the Levant at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and War Machine at 6 or less.

mekong_echo_network.name: Mekong Echo Network
mekong_echo_network.passive: Investigate gains +1 Evidence in the Mekong and support cards gain +1 on Silenced Truth campaigns.
mekong_echo_network.weakness: Defend outside the Mekong sets 1 less Defense.
mekong_echo_network.mandateDescription: End with the Mekong at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Silenced Truth at 5 or more.

amazon_guardians.name: Amazon Guardians
amazon_guardians.passive: Campaigns in the Amazon or Dying Planet gain +1 and Organize gains +1 Comrade in the Amazon.
amazon_guardians.weakness: Smuggle Evidence can move only 1 Evidence at a time.
amazon_guardians.mandateDescription: End with the Amazon at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Fossil Grip at 5 or more progress.

april_6_youth.name: April 6 Youth Movement
april_6_youth.passive: The Square: If Cairo has 5+ Comrades, actions there gain +2. Martyrdom: If Comrades lost in Cairo, Revolutionary Wave +1.
april_6_youth.mandateDescription: End with Revolutionary Wave at 8 or more.

labor_movement.name: Independent Labor Unions
labor_movement.passive: Labor Strike actions gain +2 on success.
labor_movement.weakness: Campaigns outside industrial zones cost +1 Comrade.
labor_movement.mandateDescription: End with Empty Stomach at 5 or more.

independent_journalists.name: Independent Journalists
independent_journalists.weakness: Defend outside Cairo sets 1 less Defense.
independent_journalists.mandateDescription: End with Silenced Truth at 6 or more.

rights_defenders.name: Rights Defenders
rights_defenders.mandateDescription: End with War Machine at 4 or less.

kurdish_women.name: Kurdish Women
kurdish_women.passive: Actions cost 1 less Comrade in Kurdistan.
kurdish_women.mandateDescription: End with Patriarchal Grip < 5 and Kurdistan at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens.

student_union.name: University Student Union
student_union.passive: +1 to all Digital Front (Silenced Truth) campaigns.

male_allies.name: Male Allies
male_allies.passive: May transfer actions to a female faction without spending Evidence.
male_allies.weakness: Cannot resolve Burn Veil action directly.

fln_urban_cells.name: FLN Urban Cells
fln_urban_cells.passive: Investigate gains +1 Evidence in Algiers, and urban cells turn the capital corridor into launch infrastructure.
fln_urban_cells.weakness: Failed campaigns in Algiers immediately add 1 Extraction there.
fln_urban_cells.mandateDescription: End with Global Gaze at 12 or more and Algiers at 2 or fewer Extraction Tokens.

kabyle_maquis.name: Kabyle Maquis
kabyle_maquis.passive: Launch Campaign gains +1 in Kabylie Mountains, and mountain offensives strike harder from the maquis.
kabyle_maquis.weakness: Global Appeal costs +1 Evidence when War Machine is 8 or higher.
kabyle_maquis.mandateDescription: End with Liberation Cohesion at 6 or more and Kabylie Mountains at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens.

rural_organizing_committees.name: Rural Organizing Committees
rural_organizing_committees.passive: Organize gains +1 Comrade in Sahara South, and solidarity is cheaper across rural routes there.
rural_organizing_committees.weakness: Military intervention in Sahara South removes 1 extra Comrade.
rural_organizing_committees.mandateDescription: End with Repression Cycle at 6 or less and Sahara South at 2 or fewer Extraction Tokens.

border_solidarity_networks.name: Border Solidarity Networks
border_solidarity_networks.passive: Smuggle Evidence can move up to 2 Evidence, and cross-border supply gains +1 Comrade.
border_solidarity_networks.weakness: Border Closure effects hit this seat first when multiple seats are valid.
border_solidarity_networks.mandateDescription: End with Torture & Detention Network at 4 or less and French Metropole Influence at 2 or fewer Extraction Tokens.

organize.name: Organize
organize.description: Roll 1d6 Comrades into a region, plus pressure bonuses where extraction is already entrenched.

investigate.name: Investigate
investigate.description: Generate Evidence and draw resistance cards.

launch_campaign.name: Launch Campaign
launch_campaign.description: Commit Comrades and Evidence to a 2d6 campaign against a Domain in a region.

build_solidarity.name: Build Solidarity
build_solidarity.description: Spend 3 Comrades in-region to advance a Domain without a roll.

smuggle_evidence.name: Smuggle Evidence
smuggle_evidence.description: Move Evidence to another faction through a risky corridor.

international_outreach.name: Global Appeal
international_outreach.description: Spend Evidence to raise Global Gaze.

defend.name: Defend
defend.description: Convert Comrades into a one-round Defense Rating against the next intervention.

play_card.name: Play Card
play_card.description: Resolve an action card from hand for direct tactical impact.

go_viral.name: Go Viral
go_viral.description: Spend 1 Evidence, raise Global Gaze by 1.

burn_veil.name: Burn Veil
burn_veil.description: Raise Global Gaze by 2, lose 1 Comrade.

schoolgirl_network.name: Schoolgirl Network
schoolgirl_network.description: Gain 1 Evidence, next action in region costs 1 less.

compose_chant.name: Compose Chant
compose_chant.description: Spend 1 Evidence, create permanent +1 track modifier in region.

coordinate_digital.name: Digital Coordination
coordinate_digital.description: Spend 1 Evidence, open the table-wide re-plan window.

expose_regime_lies.name: Expose Regime Lies
expose_regime_lies.description: Spend 2 Evidence, reduce War Machine by 1.

beacon_levant_corridor.title: Corridor Of Return
beacon_levant_corridor.description: Levant at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Global Gaze at 10 or more.

beacon_mekong_testimony.title: River Testimony
beacon_mekong_testimony.description: Mekong at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Silenced Truth at 5 or more.

beacon_amazon_sovereignty.title: Forest Sovereignty
beacon_amazon_sovereignty.description: Amazon at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Dying Planet at 6 or more.

beacon_congo_commons.title: Copper Commons
beacon_congo_commons.description: Congo at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Fossil Grip at 5 or more.

beacon_sahel_bread_pact.title: Bread Pact
beacon_sahel_bread_pact.description: Sahel at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Empty Stomach at 5 or more.

beacon_andes_charter.title: Mountain Charter
beacon_andes_charter.description: Andes at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Gilded Cage at 5 or more.

beacon_tahrir_18_days.title: The 18 Days
beacon_tahrir_18_days.description: Cairo at 2 or fewer Extraction Tokens (Tahrir never empty).

beacon_tahrir_labor_student.title: Labor-Student Alliance
beacon_tahrir_labor_student.description: Successfully call 3 Labor Strikes (Represented by high Empty Stomach domain).

beacon_wlf_global_solidarity.title: Global Solidarity
beacon_wlf_global_solidarity.description: Global Gaze at least 12 and Patriarchal Grip at most 4.

beacon_wlf_no_executions.title: Halt Executions
beacon_wlf_no_executions.description: War Machine drops to 3 or lower.

beacon_tahrir_victory.title: Tahrir Victory
beacon_tahrir_victory.description: Cairo at 1 or fewer Extraction and Revolutionary Wave at 8 or more.

beacon_labor_solidarity.title: Labor Solidarity
beacon_labor_solidarity.description: Industrial hubs at 1 or fewer Extraction and Empty Stomach at 5 or more.

beacon_wlf_liberation.title: WLF Liberation
beacon_wlf_liberation.description: Kurdistan and Tehran at 1 or fewer Extraction and Patriarchal Grip at 3 or less.

beacon_digital_truth.title: Digital Truth
beacon_digital_truth.description: 5 regions at 1 or fewer Extraction and Silenced Truth at 8 or more.

beacon_alg_torture_exposed.title: Expose the Torture Network
beacon_alg_torture_exposed.description: The torture system is forced into the open.

beacon_alg_tribunal_acknowledgement.title: Force International Reckoning
beacon_alg_tribunal_acknowledgement.description: An international tribunal acknowledges colonial abuses.

res_archive_leak.name: Archive Leak
res_archive_leak.text: Raise Global Gaze by 1 and gain 1 Evidence.

res_mutual_aid_convoy.name: Mutual Aid Convoy
res_mutual_aid_convoy.text: Remove 1 Extraction Token from the target region.

res_radio_uprising.name: Radio Uprising
res_radio_uprising.text: Advance Silenced Truth by 1 and add 1 Comrade to the target region.

res_strike_fund.name: Strike Fund
res_strike_fund.text: Add 3 Comrades to the target region.

res_lawyers_brief.name: Lawyers Brief
res_lawyers_brief.text: Advance Gilded Cage by 1 and reduce War Machine by 1.

res_tahrir_cell_phone_video.name: Cell Phone Video
res_tahrir_cell_phone_video.text: Gain 2 Evidence. This can also fuel Go Viral.

res_tahrir_al_jazeera_interview.name: Al Jazeera Interview
res_tahrir_al_jazeera_interview.text: Gain 3 Evidence and raise Global Gaze by 1.

res_tahrir_lawyer_brief.name: Lawyer's Legal Brief
res_tahrir_lawyer_brief.text: Add 1 Comrade in Alexandria and advance Patriarchal Grip by 1.

res_wlf_vpn_network.name: VPN Network
res_wlf_vpn_network.text: Gain 2 Evidence and push testimony past the blackout.

res_wlf_diaspora_protest.name: Diaspora Protest Rally
res_wlf_diaspora_protest.text: Add 2 Comrades in the chosen region.

crisis_military_raid.name: Military Raid
crisis_military_raid.text: A logistics corridor is secured through direct force.

crisis_media_smear.name: Media Smear
crisis_media_smear.text: The movement is reframed as disorder to cool public attention.

crisis_fuel_convoy.name: Fuel Convoy
crisis_fuel_convoy.text: The corridor reopens under armed protection.

crisis_border_lockdown.name: Border Lockdown
crisis_border_lockdown.text: Containment expands under the language of security.

crisis_hunger_discipline.name: Hunger Discipline
crisis_hunger_discipline.text: Debt, rationing, and coercion force communities back into dependence.

crisis_climate_shock.name: Climate Shock
crisis_climate_shock.text: Disaster is turned into a fast lane for seizure.

crisis_memory_purge.name: Memory Purge
crisis_memory_purge.text: Archives, schools, and ceremonies are treated as hostile terrain.

crisis_attention_backlash.name: Attention Backlash
crisis_attention_backlash.text: Visibility triggers a sharper retaliatory strike.

crisis_port_seizure.name: Port Seizure
crisis_port_seizure.text: Trade chokepoints are tightened to discipline the region.

crisis_platform_blackout.name: Platform Blackout
crisis_platform_blackout.text: The channel collapses under coordinated censorship.

sys_emergency_powers.name: Emergency Powers Enacted
sys_emergency_powers.text: Exception is written into ordinary rule. Campaigns face a higher bar from here forward.

sys_resource_privatization_wave.name: Resource Privatization Wave
sys_resource_privatization_wave.text: Every new crisis becomes another pretext to deepen the carve-up.

sys_militarized_infrastructure.name: Militarized Infrastructure
sys_militarized_infrastructure.text: Roads, ports, and corridors become permanent security architecture.

sys_surveillance_normalization.name: Surveillance Normalization
sys_surveillance_normalization.text: Every campaign now moves through denser fog and better targeting.

sys_structural_adjustment_program.name: Structural Adjustment Program
sys_structural_adjustment_program.text: Appeals to the outside now cost more because every concession is monetized.

sys_counterinsurgency_doctrine.name: Counterinsurgency Doctrine Expansion
sys_counterinsurgency_doctrine.text: Evidence circulates more slowly as suppression becomes doctrine.

crisis_tahrir_central_security.name: Central Security Forces
crisis_tahrir_central_security.text: Military intervention in Cairo. Add 2 Extraction to Cairo.

crisis_tahrir_internet_shutdown.name: Internet Shutdown
crisis_tahrir_internet_shutdown.text: The state cuts access. All players lose 1 Evidence.

crisis_tahrir_camel_battle.name: Camel Battle
crisis_tahrir_camel_battle.text: Regime thugs attack Tahrir on horses. Remove Bodies from Cairo. Gain Global Gaze.

crisis_tahrir_state_tv_lies.name: State TV Lies
crisis_tahrir_state_tv_lies.text: Regime claims protests are foreign agents. Reduce Global Gaze.

crisis_tahrir_military_trials.name: Military Trials
crisis_tahrir_military_trials.text: Protesters are tried in military courts. Remove Bodies, gain Evidence.

crisis_tahrir_constitutional_declaration.name: Constitutional Declaration
crisis_tahrir_constitutional_declaration.text: Presidency grants itself unlimited power. Add to Unfinished Justice.

crisis_tahrir_rabaa_massacre.name: Rabaa Massacre
crisis_tahrir_rabaa_massacre.text: A brutal crackdown. Gain permanent Global Gaze and add Extraction.

sys_tahrir_state_of_emergency.name: State of Emergency
sys_tahrir_state_of_emergency.text: The interior ministry locks down transit.

crisis_wlf_morality_police_raid.name: Morality Police Raid
crisis_wlf_morality_police_raid.text: A patrol hits Tehran. Remove Bodies and add Extraction.

crisis_wlf_internet_blackout.name: Internet Blackout
crisis_wlf_internet_blackout.text: The state cuts access. All players lose Evidence. Global Gaze drops.

crisis_wlf_gas_attacks_on_schools.name: Gas Attacks on Schools
crisis_wlf_gas_attacks_on_schools.text: Retaliation against schoolgirls. War Machine increases.

crisis_wlf_sham_trials_and_executions.name: Sham Trials and Executions
crisis_wlf_sham_trials_and_executions.text: Protesters are executed to instill fear. Patriarchal Grip +1.

crisis_wlf_irgc_deployment.name: IRGC Deployment
crisis_wlf_irgc_deployment.text: The Revolutionary Guard steps in. Add Extraction to peripheral regions.

sys_wlf_hijab_crackdown.name: Hijab Crackdown
sys_wlf_hijab_crackdown.text: The regime turns compulsory modesty law into a disciplined daily crackdown.

crs_alg_battle_of_algiers.name: Battle of Algiers
crs_alg_battle_of_algiers.text: The colonial state saturates the capital corridor with raids, checkpoints, and collective punishment.

crs_alg_oas_terror_attack.name: OAS Terror Attack
crs_alg_oas_terror_attack.text: Settler terror escalates to fracture civilian life and harden colonial resolve.

crs_alg_rural_village_burned.name: Rural Village Burned
crs_alg_rural_village_burned.text: Scorched-earth tactics punish the countryside and disrupt organizing.

crs_alg_mass_arrest_sweep.name: Mass Arrest Sweep
crs_alg_mass_arrest_sweep.text: Detention and disappearance reach deep into the movement.

crs_alg_french_national_assembly_debate.name: French National Assembly Debate
crs_alg_french_national_assembly_debate.text: The metropole debates reform while refusing to break the structure of colonial rule.

crs_alg_international_press_leak.name: International Press Leak
crs_alg_international_press_leak.text: Testimony crosses borders and weakens the colonial story.

crs_alg_evian_talks.name: Evian Talks
crs_alg_evian_talks.text: Negotiations open without ending coercion across the front.

crs_alg_border_closure.name: Border Closure
crs_alg_border_closure.text: Supply corridors tighten under coordinated surveillance.

crs_alg_settler_militias_mobilize.name: Settler Militias Mobilize
crs_alg_settler_militias_mobilize.text: Pied-noir forces organize to sabotage decolonization and punish civilians.

crs_alg_torture_network_exposed.name: Torture Network Exposed
crs_alg_torture_network_exposed.text: The machinery of torture becomes undeniable abroad.

crs_alg_political_assassination.name: Political Assassination
crs_alg_political_assassination.text: Elimination of movement leadership strains unity and trust.

crs_alg_referendum_announcement.name: Referendum Announcement
crs_alg_referendum_announcement.text: The colonial center offers managed transition under pressure.

res_alg_urban_cell_network.name: Urban Cell Network
res_alg_urban_cell_network.text: Neighborhood cells move witness, shelter, and clandestine coordination across the capital.

res_alg_mountain_guerrilla_offensive.name: Mountain Guerrilla Offensive
res_alg_mountain_guerrilla_offensive.text: +2 on a campaign launched from the mountains or toward colonial army pressure.

res_alg_international_student_solidarity.name: International Student Solidarity
res_alg_international_student_solidarity.text: Student networks force the struggle into international discourse.

res_alg_labor_strike.name: Labor Strike
res_alg_labor_strike.text: Workers disrupt colonial commerce and settler confidence.

res_alg_cultural_resistance_campaign.name: Cultural Resistance Campaign
res_alg_cultural_resistance_campaign.text: +1 on campaigns that preserve memory, witness, and political legitimacy.

res_alg_underground_printing_press.name: Underground Printing Press
res_alg_underground_printing_press.text: Pamphlets, testimony, and clandestine news circulate despite censorship.

res_alg_mass_funeral_mobilization.name: Mass Funeral Mobilization
res_alg_mass_funeral_mobilization.text: Collective mourning strengthens determination and shared purpose.

res_alg_negotiation_delegation.name: Negotiation Delegation
res_alg_negotiation_delegation.text: Movement delegates force the question of colonial abuse into formal forums.

res_alg_cross_border_supply.name: Cross-Border Supply
res_alg_cross_border_supply.text: Border routes keep the movement materially alive across the eastern frontier.

res_alg_prison_solidarity_network.name: Prison Solidarity Network
res_alg_prison_solidarity_network.text: Families and clandestine networks keep prisoners politically present.

res_alg_ceasefire_proposal.name: Ceasefire Proposal
res_alg_ceasefire_proposal.text: +1 on campaigns that reduce colonial impunity or open negotiation space.

res_alg_grassroots_education.name: Grassroots Education
res_alg_grassroots_education.text: Political education binds scattered struggle into collective strategy.

sys_alg_colonial_army_sweep.name: Colonial Army Sweep
sys_alg_colonial_army_sweep.text: The colonial army tightens military pressure across the most vulnerable front.

sys_alg_settler_political_veto.name: Settler Political Veto
sys_alg_settler_political_veto.text: Settler pressure hardens both the colonial center and the metropole against compromise.

sys_alg_detention_grid_tightens.name: Detention Grid Tightens
sys_alg_detention_grid_tightens.text: The detention network widens to disappear militants and witnesses.

sys_alg_nato_cover.name: NATO Cover
sys_alg_nato_cover.text: Geopolitical backing shields colonial violence from immediate consequence.

sys_alg_counter_insurgency_doctrine.name: Counter-Insurgency Doctrine
sys_alg_counter_insurgency_doctrine.text: Doctrine spreads forced relocation, intelligence fusion, and punitive raids.

sys_alg_administrative_partition.name: Administrative Partition
sys_alg_administrative_partition.text: Fragmentation is used to isolate fronts and discipline the struggle.

tahrir_square.name: 2011 — Tahrir Square
tahrir_square.description: For eighteen days, we were free.
tahrir_square.introduction: Lead the January 25 Revolution against the security state and its shifting successors.
tahrir_square.story: The revolution is not a moment, but a field of struggle. From the Square to the factories, the wave tries to topple a deep state.
tahrir_square.dramatization: Smoke, chants, and the sound of falling monuments. The Square must hold at all costs.
tahrir_square.gameplay: Maintain Presence in Cairo. If the Square empties, the revolutionary wave recedes. Martyrs surge progress but at high cost.
tahrir_square.moralCenter: Tahrir is the beating heart; the martyrs are the fuel of continuity.

the_square.label: The Square
the_square.description: If Cairo is empty of comrades for two consecutive rounds, Revolutionary Wave decreases by 1.

martyrdom.label: Martyrdom
martyrdom.description: For every 4 comrades removed from Cairo, Revolutionary Wave increases by 1.

woman_life_freedom.name: 2022 — Woman, Life, Freedom
woman_life_freedom.introduction: Lead a female-led uprising against patriarchal rule and security dominance.
woman_life_freedom.story: After the death of Mahsa Amini, the streets erupted. Veils burnt, walls spoke, and the vanguard shook the foundations of power.
woman_life_freedom.dramatization: Hair in the wind, fire in the streets, and a cry that echoes through prisons.
woman_life_freedom.gameplay: Break the patriarchal grip through viral dissent and symbolic defiance. Schoolgirls are your network.
woman_life_freedom.moralCenter: Women are the vanguard; their liberation is the liberation of all.

hijab_enforcement.label: Hijab Enforcement
hijab_enforcement.description: High enforcement regions penalize woman-led movement and organize actions.

gender_dynamics.label: Gender Dynamics
gender_dynamics.description: Male allies can shield or transfer actions to support female-led factions.

algerian_war_of_independence.name: 1954 — Algerian War of Independence
algerian_war_of_independence.introduction: Lead a movement-centered struggle against French colonial rule, detention, and settler political power between 1954 and 1962.
algerian_war_of_independence.story: The movement survives between the capital corridor, Kabylia, the western settler coast, the Saharan south, the Tunisian frontier, and the metropole. Every gain invites harsher repression; every sacrifice leaves a mark that outlives the war.
algerian_war_of_independence.dramatization: Relentless raids, clandestine printing presses, border routes, funeral marches, and the unbearable knowledge that liberation itself will not heal every wound.
algerian_war_of_independence.gameplay: Evidence strengthens witness but also raises Repression Cycle. Urban operations trigger colonial escalation. Symbolic victory depends on forcing international acknowledgement of colonial abuse.
algerian_war_of_independence.moralCenter: Liberation is collective, necessary, and costly. Victory ends colonial rule, not the scars it leaves behind.

repression_feedback.label: Repression Feedback
repression_feedback.description: Whenever the coalition gains Evidence, Repression Cycle rises by 1.

urban_operations.label: Urban Operations
urban_operations.description: Successful campaigns in Algiers or Oran increase War Machine by 1.

referendum_pressure.label: Force Immediate Referendum
referendum_pressure.description: Symbolic victory requires international acknowledgement of colonial abuse, not just attention.

repression_cycle.label: Repression Cycle
repression_cycle.description: At 5 the movement suffers mass detention. At 7 torture is exposed. At 9 a nationwide state of emergency hardens every campaign. At 10 the coalition loses 1 Comrade each round.
